ROOT CAUSE CONFIRMED by probe v4: emit(uninstall) FIRES (handler alive, calls _uninstallDialog.el.show()) but NO mpi-modal node ever appends to body -> _doShow never runs -> MpiModal el.show() early-returns on stuck _isShown=true. Desync state: _isShown=true while _backdrop=null, which NO existing reset reaches (ui:close-all-popups handler is _backdrop-guarded, so el.hide() never fires, never resets the flag). Cause: a prior _doShow set true, then backdrop removed WITHOUT el.hide() (install-driven renderList body churn / observer self-destruct / bare Overlays.reset). FIX (committed pending): MpiModal el.show() reconciles guard against real DOM — if (_isShown && !_backdrop) _isShown=false. App-side, no image.

FIXED + committed 3845756 (MpiModal.js only). MpiModal el.show() now reconciles the stuck-true _isShown guard against real DOM (if _isShown && !_backdrop -> _isShown=false). FIXED + VERIFIED LIVE (commit a28c7a8). Fix: installed-section gate now keys on genuinely-active states (downloading/paused/installing); terminal/complete takes the uninstall branch. MPI-96 addendum (same family, USER live-verified): cancel-button gap on auto-connect-on-start. Boot auto-connect (shell.js _initRemoteBoot) bypasses the settings panel, so opening Settings mid-boot showed a DISABLED Connect — no way to cancel a billing Pod. Fix: MpiSettings connecting&&!ready branch now shows ENABLED Cancel routed to existing _cancelConnect (deletes active Pod backend-side); shell.js _pollRemoteReady returns new 'aborted' state on {running:false,ready:false,connecting:false,no podStatus} past grace so the boot loop bails instead of zombieing to 20-min timeout + false error dialog. ESLint clean. USER verified: Cancel mid-boot -> 'Connection cancelled' toast, button back to CONNECT, 'stopped'. Card stays done/accepted.
